reviews.comment:
Entrada por Av Cabildo, Ypf y ACA. Tiene varios surtidores, buena atención y rápida. Tiene un shop de cosas para el auto y uno de comida, donde se puede tomar algo. También cuenta con YPF Boxes y lavado de auto del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Entrance via Av. Cabildo, YPF and ACA. It has several gas pumps, good and fast service. There's a shop selling car accessories and a food stand where you can get something to eat. It also has YPF service bays and an ACA car wash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5N0xyOThnRRAB

reviews.comment:
LLeve a lavar el auto, completo, chasis , carroceria y motor. Tenia miedo por el motor, pero la verdad quedo joya y no tuve problemas. El ACA siempre nos da un buen servicio!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I took the car for a complete wash: chassis, body, and engine. I was worried about the engine, but it turned out great, and I had no problems. ACA always gives us great service!
